header.title: Survey statistics
header.description: Review participation and question-level outcomes through an operational results list instead of a visual card wall.

empty.title: No survey results found
empty.description: Adjust the filters to find the survey analytics you need.
empty.lecturerDescription: No results match your department scope and current filters.

errors.renderFailed: Unable to render the report. Please try again later.
errors.loadAiStatus: Unable to load AI summary status.

header.title: Survey result detail
header.description: Review overview metrics, participation, rating distributions, and anonymous text comments in grouped analytics sections.

participation.title: Participation summary
participation.description: Identity is intentionally excluded here. This section stays at the aggregate level for staff review.

questions.title: Question analytics
questions.description: Rating questions show distribution and averages. Text questions are separated below for easier qualitative review.

empty.title: No rating analytics
empty.description: This survey does not contain rating questions with distribution data.

ai.title: AI summary
ai.description: Generate an admin-facing summary from student text feedback only when you need it. The analysis runs in the background and reuses the latest result when the feedback has not changed.

freshness.upToDateDescription: There are no new text feedback changes after the latest summary.
freshness.minorChangesDescription_one: There is {{count}} new response, but it is below the refresh threshold.
freshness.minorChangesDescription_other: There are {{count}} new responses, but they are below the refresh threshold.
freshness.refreshRecommendedDescription_one: There is {{count}} important new response. Updating the summary is recommended.
freshness.refreshRecommendedDescription_other: There are {{count}} important new responses. Updating the summary is recommended.

ai.notRequested: No AI summary has been generated for this survey yet. The system only analyzes text feedback after you explicitly request it.
ai.processingNotice: The summary job is processing in the background. This panel refreshes automatically until a result is available.

lists.emptyHighlights: No strong positive theme was extracted from the current text responses.
lists.emptyConcerns: No repeated concern cluster was extracted from the current text responses.
lists.emptyActions: No concrete action recommendation was generated for the current text responses.

comments.title: Text comments
comments.description: Anonymous comments are grouped by question. Search applies only to comment text and question copy.

empty.title: No matching comments
empty.description: Adjust the comment search to find the qualitative feedback you need.
